summary: MEDIUM preflight-multiline-next-command-breaks-bullet: architecture-reason-frontmatter's next_command embeds a literal newline and renderPrAutopilotSummary renders it inline, producing an orphaned second line with no bullet marker (reproduced on a synthetic repo); ambiguous with multiple detected recipes and uncovered by the CLI-surface e2e (which exercises only single-line rows). MEDIUM preflight-summary-drops-reason: the rendered text omits each recipe's reason field, so non-JSON operators see only recipe_id + command with no explanation. LOW preflight-no-user-doc-coverage: no docs mention pr autopilot or the Preflight section (pre-existing gap, lower priority). Shell-quoting fix from round 1 verified correct.

inspection.summary: Ran ad-hoc scripts against the real runRecipePreflight + renderPrAutopilotSummary path on synthetic repos (reproducing the multiline break and verifying the quoting fix), executed the e2e suite (8/8), grepped docs for preflight/autopilot coverage (zero hits).
inspection.evidence: synthetic-repo render reproduction (2 runs, by reviewer); node --test e2e spec (8/8); docs grep (0 hits)

judgment_delta: initial: only re-verify the quoting fix -> final: needs_changes, because exercising the same rendering path more broadly surfaced a reproducible multiline-bullet break and a missing-reason usability gap
